Labour Party — Our Policies (current, from labour.org.nz/our-policies)

$20 Public Transport Fare Cap — $20 a week is the most you'll pay to get around by bus or train under Labour.

Free Doctor's Visits — Three free doctor's visits a year for everyone. Delivered with Labour's new Medicard.

Free Prescriptions — Labour will remove the $5 fee on prescriptions to make them free – for everyone.

Free Maternity Scans — Labour will make maternity scans free, everywhere in New Zealand with the Medicard.

New Zealand Future Fund — Backing New Zealand's potential and investing in our future - for a future made in New Zealand.

Free Cervical Screening — With Labour's Medicard, cervical screening will be free and every New Zealander gets three free doctor's visits every year.

Family Doctor Loan Scheme — Labour's Family Doctor Loan Scheme is the next step in our plan to make it easier to get a doctor's appointment.

Capital Gains Tax — Labour is setting out the facts about a Capital Gains Tax in New Zealand.
